description: Controls animation timing for shape appearance, visibility, and exit
utility: Specify enter duration, stay duration, and exit duration in seconds

arguments.name: enterDuration
arguments.description: Time in seconds for shape to animate in (default: 0 for no animation)

arguments.name: stayDuration
arguments.description: Time in seconds for shape to remain visible (optional)

arguments.name: exitDuration
arguments.description: Time in seconds for shape to animate out (defaults to enter duration if not specified)

examples.scenario: Enter 0.5s, stay 3s, exit defaults to enter
